meaning: adj.世仇的,封建制度的,封地的,领地的
examples: Diplomacy was in his blood: his ancestors had been feudal lords.
This historical novel illustrates the breaking up of feudal society in microcosm.
Feudal Japan with samurais and ninjas, medieval castles in England from the Braveheart era.
When this stuff started out we were talking pre-feudal -- totally made up on the spot.
